blueprints.title: Grade 7 Life Orientation Baseline Diagnostic
blueprints.description: Samples approved items across all 16 CAPS topics in grade7_life_orientation_en to establish a starting mastery profile.

blueprints.title: Development of the self in society Topic Diagnostic
blueprints.description: Diagnostic covering CAPS 7.LO.1.1 with balanced difficulty and misconception coverage.

blueprints.title: Development of the self in society Short Practice
blueprints.description: Short practice quiz after the standard lesson variant.

blueprints.title: Development of the self in society Recheck
blueprints.description: Targets previously missed misconceptions with on-level and challenging items.

blueprints.title: Development of the self in society Mastery Check
blueprints.description: End-of-topic check emphasising on-level and challenging application items.
